---
title: "Source notes"
---

Source notes are short notes attached to a whole source rather than to a specific coded passage.

Use notes for observations that help interpret the source, such as context, data quality, uncertainty, or follow-up questions.

## Open and edit notes

Open the note drawer from the coding screen. Notes save into the `.ace` project file.

Empty notes are removed, so the project only keeps notes with content.

## Export notes

Use the notes export when you want to review source-level observations outside ACE or include them in an audit trail.
